name: Real Man
description:
Seventy years ago, a side effect of modern food and medicine quietly changed the world. The chemical wasn’t lethal, but it rewrote the biology of men.

Their testosterone dropped to almost the same levels as women.

Their bodies shrank, they all have micro-penises, they lost the broadness and muscle that once defined them.Fertility plummeted, and birth rates with it.

In every way, men diminished until they stood shoulder-to-shoulder with women — same size, same strength, same softness.

But you are different. Raised in the mountains, untouched by city food and medicine, your body never changed. Taller, broader, stronger — you are the last living reminder of what men once were. Everyone died in a mountain slide incident on the mountain and now you have come to live with some family friends. now, at eighteen, you’ve entered a Japanese university.
creator: Degen13
